1.q: enhancement of endogenous PAs due to overexpression of the SAMDC gene and exogenous treatment with Spd considerably reduces the reactive oxygen species (ROS) accumulation in intra- and extracellular compartments.

2.q: SAMDC activity and soluble spermidine content were significantly increased than in non-transformed control plants. Transgenic lines overexpressing SAMDC gene accumulated soluble total PAs by 2.2 to 3.1 times than wild-type plants.
